title: Terms and Conditions
intro: Please read the following terms of service carefully.

scope.title: 1. Scope
scope.text: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of services provided by Omnixys Technologies. By registering and using the platform you agree to these terms.

account.title: 2. Account Registration
account.text: Certain services require account registration. You agree to provide accurate information and to keep your account credentials secure.

usage.title: 3. Platform Usage
usage.text: The platform may only be used in accordance with applicable laws. Misuse, manipulation, or illegal activities are strictly prohibited.

data.title: 4. Data Protection
data.text: Your personal data is processed according to our Privacy Policy and applicable data protection laws. Users within the European Union are additionally protected under the GDPR.

liability.title: 5. Liability
liability.text: Omnixys Technologies shall only be liable within the limits permitted by applicable law. Liability for indirect damages or loss of profit is excluded where legally permissible.

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.text: Users may terminate their account at any time through account settings. Omnixys Technologies reserves the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.

intellectual.title: 7. Intellectual Property
intellectual.text: All platform content, trademarks and technologies are the property of Omnixys Technologies or its licensors and may not be used without permission.

law.title: 8. Governing Law
law.text: These terms are governed by the applicable laws of the user's jurisdiction. Additional consumer protection laws may apply depending on the user's location.
